name: 21" Woven Rattan Storage Trunk Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Lend a touch of vintage style to your home decor with the 21-Inch Woven Rattan Storage Trunk from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This brown storage trunk is designed in a natural shade with brown faux leather accents. It's woven with rattan and has a metal frame with flap-like closure, making it great for everyday use. You can use it to stash away pillows, blankets and more.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
